finding_results.notes: Three capsule-diagnosis beats roughened. (1) Lines 511-515: Sarah's clean 'one difference between me and Dominic' / 'Dominic was done, he'd pay first and get angry later' replaced with an anecdotal arrival through the Milford incident — she recalls telling herself she'd be practical, then Dominic writing the check anyway, landing on 'So. Probably not.' The Renata observation now arrives through a self-correction ('it's not—') rather than a clean standalone diagnosis. (2) Lines 527-531: The quotable 'I'm not doing a wife thing. I'm doing math' replaced with a friction-filled exchange — 'don't make it into something' / 'I wasn't' / 'You were about to' — where Sarah preempts Nate's deflection and Nate denies it, adding evasive friction. (3) Lines 555-559: The literary 'where the debt lives' replaced with the flatter, more practical 'ask him the name of the place' / 'if he won't say it, he's still going.' Sarah's authority preserved throughout — she still demonstrates deep knowledge of the family dynamics and still gives sharp practical advice, but now arrives through specific memory, self-interruption, and plain observation rather than composed quotable summary. Nate's evasive friction added via his silence after the Milford anecdote (line 513) and his mild denial at line 529.
